mapper.select: SELECT ep.id as ep_id, ep.title as ep_title, ep.description as ep_description, ep.creation_date as ep_creation_date, q.id as q_id, q.content as q_content, q.question_type as q_question_type, q.default_score as q_default_score FROM exam_paper ep LEFT JOIN exampaper_questions epq ON ep.id = epq.exampaper_id LEFT JOIN question q ON epq.question_id = q.id WHERE ep.id = #{id}

SELECT ep.id as ep_id, ep.title as ep_title, ep.description as ep_description, ep.creation_date as ep_creation_date
, q.id as q_id, q.content as q_content, q.question_type as q_question_type, q.default_score as q_default_score FROM exam_paper ep LEFT JOIN exampaper_questions epq ON ep.id = epq.exampaper_id LEFT JOIN question q ON epq.question_id = q.id ORDER BY ep.id, q.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_paper (title, description, creation_date) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM exampaper_questions WHERE exampaper_id = #{id}; DELETE FROM exam_paper WHERE id = #{id};
DELETE FROM exampaper_questions WHERE exampaper_id = #{examPaperId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.select: SELECT question_id FROM exampaper_questions WHERE exampaper_id = #{examPaperId}
